nodes.name: Yellow-gaped honeyeater
nodes.summary: Yellow-gaped honeyeater（Meliphaga flavirictus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Yellow-gaped honeyeater。

nodes.name: Meliphaga
nodes.summary: Meliphaga（Meliphaga）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联17种鸟类，如Puff-backed honeyeater、Yellow-spotted honeyeater、Lewin's honeyeater等17种鸟类。

nodes.name: Yellow-gaped honeyeater
nodes.summary: The yellow-gaped honeyeater (Meliphaga flavirictus) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found throughout New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The yellow-gaped honeyeater (Meliphaga flavirictus) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found throughout New Guinea.
